caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt is speaking into a professional microphone in a room that appears to be a clothing boutique. His shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" in white lettering. The background contains a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a mannequin dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt and grey pants, positioned next to racks of clothing. On-screen, a logo on the left says "BONE" and red text on the right reads "BONE BELLY TOT". As the scene progresses, the man continues talking, with his facial expressions and mouth movements shifting as he speaks. He occasionally gestures with his hand, and his gaze shifts slightly across the frames, while the camera remains stationary and the environment stays consistent.
